d:
Smokey & Meerky create an aroma within 2 tiles and keep it going through channeling when a battle starts. While the aroma is around, Smokey & Meerky recover [[50]] Energy per second, and allies within the aroma recover [[21%]]<ATK> HP per second.
Passive. If [[interrupted]], Smokey & Meerky lose the aroma and cannot recreate it in [[4]]s.
Active. Smokey & Meerky heal allies within the aroma by [[170%]]<ATK>, and permanently level up the aroma's effects.
Improved Aroma I: Expand the range by 1 tile. 
Improved Aroma II: Grant [[30]] Haste to allied heroes affected by the aroma.
Increase HP recovery per second to [[24%]]<ATK>.
Increase HP recovery per second to [[27%]]<ATK>.
Increase HP recovery per second to [[29%]]<ATK>.
Increase HP recovery per second to [[31%]]<ATK>.
Smokey & Meerky increase the ATK of allies within the aroma by [[16%]]. Smokey & Meerky recover [[5]] additional Energy per second for every non-summoned ally affected.
Increase the ATK of allies within the aroma by [[18%]].
Recover [[8]] additional Energy per second for every non-summoned ally affected.
Increase the ATK of allies within the aroma by [[20%]].
Smokey & Meerky recover [[90%]]<ATK> HP for allies within the aroma.
Increases HP recovery to [[100%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP recovery to [[110%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP recovery to [[120%]]<ATK>.
Smokey & Meerky increase their ATK by [[6%]] during battle. If 3 or more non-summoned allies other than Smokey & Meerky are within the aroma, they increase their ATK by an additional [[9%]].
Smokey & Meerky increase their ATK by [[8%]] during battle. If 3 or more non-summoned allies other than Smokey & Meerky are within the aroma, they increase their ATK by an additional [[12%]].
Smokey & Meerky increase their ATK by [[10%]] during battle. If 3 or more non-summoned allies other than Smokey & Meerky are within the aroma, they increase their ATK by an additional [[15%]].

Smokey & Meerky's Special Aroma gains the third level up effect, increasing the skill effect range by 1 tile. The aroma will be enhanced for [[10]]s when this skill gets the third upgrade for the first time, making the enemies within skill range lose [[12%]] of their max HP per second. The max amount of their lost HP cannot exceed [[200%]] of Smokey & Meerky's ATK.
Make enemies within skill range lose [[14%]] of their max HP during aroma enhancement.
Stun the enemy for [[0.1]]s during aroma enhancement when the enemy is losing HP.
Make enemies within skill range lose [[15%]] of their max HP during aroma enhancement.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first time an ally's HP drops below [[40%]], restores [[160%]]<ATK> HP to them and grants them a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d: Smokey & Meerky increase the HP recovery amount by [[30%]]<ATK> when using Special Aroma.
